title: Lilith and The Lance
wikitext:
[]: Lilith & The Lance             Quote Post by illeffeqt » Wed Jan 07, 2009 3:01 am Hey everyone. I understand that almost every conceivable discussion topic has already been covered in the long history of this forum, but after hours of scouring Lance-of-Longinus-related threads, I'm still looking for answers, so I thought I'd start a new post. Midway through the series, the Lance of Longinus is retrieved from the site of the Katsuragi Expedition in Antartica and brought to NERV HQ. Rei brings it down to Terminal Dogma and jams it into into Lilith's abdomen, where it remains until Rei comes back to get it later, when Gendo decides to use it against Arael in Episode 22. Here's what I'm wondering: Why does Gendo suddenly need the Lance from Antartica in the first place? We see Lilith's legs regrow when the Lance is removed in Ep.22, so we naturally assume they needed it to control her. But she's still just sort of chilling on her cross when Kaworu reaches Terminal Dogma in Ep.24... There's no evidence that she goes batshit/out-of-control without a lance. In fact, NERV seemingly chopped off her lower half to create Unit-01 (not to mention sucking out her soul and all) without a Lance to subdue her. What am I missing here? Is the Lance just one of EVA's plot devices that doesn't completely make sense? If so, have they corrected this by having Lilith impaled right-from-the-get-go in Rebuild? Somebody please help me out!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jan 07, 2009 3:28 am You will come to understand that nothing in Eva completely makes sense just like life. The lance is needed for Third Impact to truly take place I'm pretty sure...Wait for Reichu to either jump in and say something or shut me down but either way she will help you.

[]:             Quote Post by illeffeqt » Wed Jan 07, 2009 4:03 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: You will come to understand that nothing in Eva completely makes sense just like life.

[]:             Quote Post by illeffeqt » Wed Jan 07, 2009 6:27 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: The lance is needed for Third Impact to truly take place I'm pretty sure...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 07, 2009 6:46 am 3rd impact isn't a set thing. There appear to be half a dozen or so different possible 'recipies' for the end of the world as we know it.

[]:             Quote Post by illeffeqt » Wed Jan 07, 2009 6:57 am NemZ wrote: 3rd impact isn't a set thing. There appear to be half a dozen or so different possible 'recipies' for the end of the world as we know it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 07, 2009 11:39 am illeffeqt wrote: my only prayer is that rebuild WILL amend some of these details

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Jan 07, 2009 1:30 pm illeffeqt wrote: Then why does the slightest deviation from their scenario enrage the members of Seele?

[]:             Quote Post by illeffeqt » Wed Jan 07, 2009 1:46 pm Reichu wrote: I wouldn't pray too hard for cross-compatibility. The new movies are changing not only story elements, but even the "physics" of the universe (e.g., Angels burst into fluid when they die).

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 07, 2009 2:17 pm One thing I know about the LoL (What a coincedence. LoL and lol) is that the LoL can pierce through any AT field. And it was used in episode 22 to kill the angel in space. The MP Evas had there own LoLs which had the same effect as the original. Pierce through ANY AT field.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Wed Jan 07, 2009 2:30 pm Btw i would really like to know the Difference between those "fake" Lances of the Harpies and the originall Lance. In EoE it looks loke the Fakes were made out Human souls+PVM due to the Form of it shortly before they explode through the Rays of LoL

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 07, 2009 3:05 pm illeffeqt wrote: Lilith's growth? AGH.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jan 07, 2009 3:10 pm Why must the weapons have souls as well..O well that is Eva for you. Lilith's body seems to be able to regenerate on its own. I'm sorry - The lance puts the SOL into suspended animation.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 07, 2009 4:36 pm Doesn't say anything about putting a soul on standby. The wording is putting a Seed in "suspended animation". VoidEater wrote: If those little growths on Lilith are what the Reis are salvaged from, perhaps the Rei-tank was full and Gendo needed Lilith to stop that sprouting of empty shells.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jan 07, 2009 6:07 pm When is it ever implied that the fake Lances have souls? They most likely DON'T either way, since we never see souls leaving them. The difference between them and the main lance probably being that the original Lance is apparently atleast a semi-sentient entity, and is required to create the Tree of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Jan 08, 2009 5:49 am But isn't The ability to pierce Through at fields kinda unnormal for every normal weapon used on the earth? Also the only things that can pierce or break at fields ,are other at fields(or kinda anti at field). Its really strange.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jan 08, 2009 4:23 pm But isn't The ability to pierce Through at fields kinda unnormal for every normal weapon used on the earth?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jan 24, 2009 1:37 am illeffeqt wrote: I was under the impression that without her soul, she could not grow, or do anything else for that matter, besides leaking her vital fluids on the floor.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 24, 2009 2:49 pm However, this seems far fetched to me. I'm of the impression the replicas DID actually have human souls inserted into them.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 24, 2009 5:45 pm AuraTwilight wrote: After the MP Evas kill themselves, only one red marble leaves them, when there should be two.
